wyrdforge.name: WyrdForge
wyrdforge.description: Connect your game to a WYRD Protocol server for AI world-state context.

init.display-text: Initialize WyrdForge — host [b]{0}[/b] port [b]{1}[/b] timeout [b]{2}[/b] ms
init.description: Configure the WyrdHTTPServer connection. Call once at game start.

query-character.description: Fetch world context for a character from WYRD. Triggers 'On query complete' or 'On query error' when done.

persona-id.name: Persona ID
persona-id.desc: WYRD persona ID for the character (e.g. 'sigrid').

query.name: Query
query.desc: Optional query string. Leave empty for default world state context.

push-observation.description: Write a world event observation to WYRD memory.

push-fact.description: Write a world fact about a subject to WYRD.

subject-id.name: Subject ID
subject-id.desc: Entity or character ID this fact is about.

on-query-complete.description: Triggered when a QueryCharacter action completes successfully.

on-query-error.description: Triggered when a QueryCharacter, PushObservation, or PushFact action fails.

is-ready.description: True if WyrdForge has been initialized and is enabled.

last-response.description: The text response from the last successful QueryCharacter action.

last-error.description: The error message from the last failed WyrdForge action.
